description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have two jobs: create-release and build-release. The create-release job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, generates release notes, extracts the version from the tag, and creates a draft GitHub release. The build-release job depends on create-release, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs required packages, builds the project, and uploads tar.gz and tar.bz2 archives to the release.
